certification period, the patient's family contacts the HHA because the patient has an 
elevated temperature, abdominal pain, and scant urine output. The nurse visits the patient 
and determines that the catheter is plugged and there are symptoms of a urinary tract 
infection. The nurse changes the catheter and contacts the physician to report findings
